long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between fas21a.sr04.fra02 Et8/1 <-> fcs241b.sr04.fra02 Et49/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19787
short_description: fas21a.sr04.fra02 Et8/1 <-> fcs241b.sr04.fra02 Et49/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
